category_sources: Official docs at https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/getting_started/overview describe indexing content for search, conversational interfaces, and APIs.
source_facts.description says "Ultra relevant, instant and typo-tolerant full-text search API".
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub organization use the display name Meilisearch.
docs_sources: Official docs page advertises the complete documentation index at https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/llms.txt.
source_facts.homepage is the official Meilisearch documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/meilisearch/meilisearch; per instruction repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Meilisearch as a single binary with a REST API for indexing and search.
source_facts.description identifies full-text search API behavior.
